hooks.command: cmd="$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""')"; case "$cmd" in *' rm -rf /'*) echo 'Blocked: destructive command requires manual confirmation' >&2; exit 2;; esac; case "$cmd" in *push*) case "$cmd" in *'--force'*|*' -f'*|*' -f') case "$cmd" in *'origin main'*|*'origin master'*) echo 'Blocked: force push to main/master requires manual confirmation' >&2; exit 2;; esac;; esac;; esac
